# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cloud network security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
- name: three-tier-vpc
  type: compute.v1.network
  properties:
    name: three-tier-vpc
    autoMode: false
    routingConfig:
      routingMode: REGIONAL

- name: web-tier-subnet
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    name: web-tier-subnet
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    region: us-central1
    ipCidrRange: 10.1.0.0/24
    privateIpGoogleAccess: true
    logConfig:
      enable: true
      flowSampling: 0.5
      metadata: INCLUDE_ALL_METADATA
      aggregationInterval: INTERVAL_5_SEC

- name: app-tier-subnet
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    name: app-tier-subnet
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    region: us-central1
    ipCidrRange: 10.2.0.0/24
    privateIpGoogleAccess: true
    logConfig:
      enable: true
      flowSampling: 0.5
      metadata: INCLUDE_ALL_METADATA
      aggregationInterval: INTERVAL_5_SEC

- name: db-tier-subnet
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    name: db-tier-subnet
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    region: us-central1
    ipCidrRange: 10.3.0.0/24
    privateIpGoogleAccess: true
    logConfig:
      enable: true
      flowSampling: 0.5
      metadata: INCLUDE_ALL_METADATA
      aggregationInterval: INTERVAL_5_SEC

# Firewall: Allow external HTTPS traffic to web tier only
- name: allow-https-to-web
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "443"
    sourceRanges:
      - "0.0.0.0/0"
    targetTags:
      - web-tier
    logConfig:
      enable: true

# Firewall: Allow web tier to talk to app tier on app port
- name: allow-web-to-app
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "8080"
    sourceTags:
      - web-tier
    targetTags:
      - app-tier
    logConfig:
      enable: true

# Firewall: Allow app tier to talk to db tier on database port
- name: allow-app-to-db
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "5432"
    sourceTags:
      - app-tier
    targetTags:
      - db-tier
    logConfig:
      enable: true

# Firewall: Deny all other ingress traffic (explicit deny-all as safety net)
- name: deny-all-ingress
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 65534
    direction: INGRESS
    denied:
      - IPProtocol: ALL
    sourceRanges:
      - "0.0.0.0/0"
    logConfig:
      enable: true

# Firewall: Deny all egress by default, then allow only what is needed
- name: deny-all-egress
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 65534
    direction: EGRESS
    denied:
      - IPProtocol: ALL
    destinationRanges:
      - "0.0.0.0/0"
    logConfig:
      enable: true

# Firewall: Allow web tier egress to app tier subnet
- name: allow-web-egress-to-app
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: EGRESS
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "8080"
    destinationRanges:
      - 10.2.0.0/24
    targetTags:
      - web-tier
    logConfig:
      enable: true

# Firewall: Allow app tier egress to db tier subnet
- name: allow-app-egress-to-db
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: EGRESS
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "5432"
    destinationRanges:
      - 10.3.0.0/24
    targetTags:
      - app-tier
    logConfig:
      enable: true

# Firewall: Allow egress to Google APIs via Private Google Access (restricted VIP range)
- name: allow-egress-google-apis
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: EGRESS
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "443"
    destinationRanges:
      - 199.36.153.4/30
    logConfig:
      enable: true
